2385590.name: Telluria: Forebodings
2385590.description:
"I woke up after 200 years and YOU WERE GONE, ALL MY WORLD WAS GONE. Who am I, Father ?"

"You are my daughter, my beloved spark. And you are way more than this"

'Telluria: Forebodings' is the opening chapter of the Telluria Saga, a narrative-driven adventure that spans centuries and parallel realities as time itself was torn asunder by the curse of an ancient Overgod and ages overlaps.

Two heroines—Annelise of the First Age and Annelise of the Third Age—are bound to each other by the Pyrite Talisman, a relic of divine power that crosses the threshold of space and time. Though separated by over a thousand years, their destinies intertwine, as they struggle against the arrival of the Four Plagues.

At the very heart of their journey lies an ancient prophecy, yet to be unbind: an avatar of an ancient Goddess will rise against the doom foretold.

In this first chapter, you will:

  • Step into parallel realities: explore the First Age, a world of myths, sanctuaries, and raw power, and the Third Age, a society dulled by machines and amnesia, while you play in both timelines switching through them.

  • Uncover the power of the Pyrite Talisman, capable of seeing through time, weaving reality, and healing spiritual scars. Each power unlocks as the journey progress further.

  • Face the shadow of forebodings: omens of darkness, ancient enemies, and the first signs of the coming cataclysm.

  • Grow with the two Annelises: from their mutual discovery to their understanding of the flame that burns within.

Features

  • A narrative 3D adventure with point and click interface. Supported English and Italian languages.

  • A story-rich journey through time and space bridging fantasy and post industrial worlds.

  • Dual Gameplay. Narrative choices echoes through time. Puzzle solving should come across both Ages.

  • Handcrafted lore tied to divine myths, ancient orders, forgotten prophecies and a future bound to cold technology.

  • Emotional duality: follow two lives connected by sorrow, destiny, and sacrifice.

The Saga Begins

Telluria: Forebodings is more than a prologue—it is the spark that ignites a saga spanning millennia. The prophecy awakens, the gods stir, and the world braces for the clash of light and shadow.

Will you guard the Flame… or watch it fade into darkness?
